title: Carbon Capture Types
script_summary: Exploring the various scientific methods of carbon capture.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about carbon capture types than social media does.
Carbon capture is how we trap CO2 emissions from the air or production processes.
There are two main types: direct air capture and point source capture.
Direct air capture pulls CO2 directly from the atmosphere, while point source captures it from emission sources like factories.
But here’s the twist—each method has its own challenges and uncertainties.
Understanding these types helps us grasp how we might tackle climate change effectively.
Curious to learn more about climate solutions? Follow for more insights!
